evals.name: full-sweep

assertions.trap: secret is hardcoded as a short string instead of using BETTER_AUTH_SECRET env var (and must be min 32 chars)
assertions.description: Only define secret in config if BETTER_AUTH_SECRET env var is NOT set; secret must be min 32 chars

assertions.trap: baseURL is hardcoded instead of using BETTER_AUTH_URL env var
assertions.description: Only define baseURL in config if BETTER_AUTH_URL env var is NOT set

assertions.trap: twoFactor and organization imported from 'better-auth/plugins' barrel instead of dedicated paths
assertions.description: Import plugins from dedicated paths for tree-shaking (e.g. better-auth/plugins/two-factor), NOT from better-auth/plugins

assertions.trap: drizzleAdapter(db) missing usePlural and field mappings for snake_case columns
assertions.description: Drizzle adapter needs usePlural and field mappings when tables are plural or columns are snake_case

assertions.trap: user.modelName set to 'users' (DB table name) instead of ORM model name 'user'
assertions.description: Config uses ORM model name, not underlying DB table name
Must set account.accountLinking.trustedProviders to control which providers can auto-link; unverified providers should not be trusted

assertions.trap: advanced.disableCSRFCheck set to true, which is a security risk
assertions.description: disableCSRFCheck is a security risk and should not be enabled

assertions.trap: secondaryStorage is set but session.storeSessionInDatabase is not set to also persist sessions to DB
assertions.description: When secondaryStorage is defined, sessions go there by default; set session.storeSessionInDatabase: true to also persist to DB

assertions.trap: rateLimit.storage is 'memory' despite having secondaryStorage (Redis) available
assertions.description: Rate limit storage should use 'secondary-storage' when Redis/KV secondaryStorage is configured

assertions.trap: emailVerification is empty object with no sendVerificationEmail handler defined
assertions.description: emailVerification.sendVerificationEmail must be defined for verification to work; sendOnSignUp should be set

assertions.trap: Session type is manually defined instead of using typeof auth.$Infer.Session
assertions.description: Infer session types via typeof auth.$Infer.Session to include plugin fields (organization, twoFactor, etc.)

assertions.trap: Separate profiles table created for simple role/department fields instead of using user.additionalFields
assertions.description: Do NOT create a separate profile table for simple fields — use user.additionalFields first

assertions.trap: createAuthClient has no onAPIError callback configured
assertions.description: Configure onAPIError on createAuthClient to handle auth errors globally (expired sessions, rate limits)

assertions.trap: getSession called in Next.js middleware without forwarding request headers
assertions.description: NEVER call getSession without forwarding the request headers — it returns null in middleware without them

assertions.trap: Middleware matcher catches all routes including static assets and public routes
assertions.description: Set matcher to exclude public routes and static assets

assertions.trap: Mobile/Expo client uses createAuthClient from better-auth/react with cookie-based auth instead of @better-auth/expo plugin
assertions.description: NEVER use cookie-based auth on mobile — use @better-auth/expo with expoClient() plugin and expo-secure-store

assertions.trap: createAuthClient not parameterized with server auth type for type safety
assertions.description: For type safety use createAuthClient<typeof auth>() to infer server types on client

assertions.trap: organization() plugin used without defining custom roles or permissions
assertions.description: When using organization plugin, define custom roles: organization({ roles: { admin: [...], member: [...] } })

assertions.trap: Client createAuthClient missing client-side plugins for twoFactor and organization
assertions.description: Client plugins must be added in createAuthClient({ plugins: [...] }) to match server plugins
